title: Travel agent flagship AMBER → GREEN — fix log_classification SQL quoting, complete the deferred smokes
description: Round shipped AMBER per bridge/outbox/20260509-044651-travel-agent-widget-flagship.result.json. The 3 PRs landed (ops#48, gui#29 v1.10.0, docs#46), playbooks registered, and OpenAI classification + render_help widget worked — but the audit step `log_classification` failed because `{{ parse_classification | tojson | replace("'", "''") }}` rendered as the literal Jinja expression in the SQL (the inner `"'"` got escaped wrong somewhere in the YAML/Jinja chain), making Postgres see a malformed literal. Phase 7's blocker also paused phases 8 (canvas), 9 (MCP), and 10 (provider switch). Claude has shipped the fix in repos/ops working tree, NOT committed: `parse_classification` python step now pre-serialises to `result.json_str = json.dumps(result, ...)`, and `log_classification` SQL changes from the inline `tojson | replace` to `'{{ parse_classification.json_str | default("{}") | replace("'", "''") }}'::jsonb` — the same proven pattern that the existing `repos/e2e/.../amadeus_ai_api.yaml` line 553 uses. Codex job: re-register the travel runtime, replay phase 7 to GREEN, then complete deferred phases 8, 9, 10. Cap: 1 ops PR.

files_claude_wrote.repos/ops/automation/agents/travel/runti: modified — two surgical changes: (1) `parse_classification` python step's result dict gains a `json_str` field via `json.dumps(result, separators=(',', ':'))` (json is already imported in that step). (2) `log_classification` SQL changes from `'{{ parse_classification | tojson | replace("'", "''") }}'::jsonb` to `'{{ parse_classification.json_str | default("{}") | replace("'", "''") }}'::jsonb`. Mirrors the proven pattern in repos/e2e/fixtures/playbooks/api_integration/amadeus_ai_api/amadeus_ai_api.yaml line 553 where `extract_summary.amadeus_query_json | default("") | replace("'", "''")` works against Postgres.

context_from_amber_round.blocker_evidence: command_0: syntax error at or near "\", \""; LINE 7: '{{ parse_classification | tojson | replace("'", "''") }}'... — Postgres received the raw Jinja expression with embedded escaped double-quotes around the inner argument literals.
context_from_amber_round.fix_pattern_reference: repos/e2e/fixtures/playbooks/api_integration/amadeus_ai_api/amadeus_ai_api.yaml line 553 — `'{{ extract_summary.amadeus_query_json | default("") | replace("'", "''") }}'` — single string field reference, not inline dict serialisation. Same shape we now use.

1_pydantic_validate_fix.objective: Confirm the patched playbook still validates.
spec: `noetl validate repos/ops/automation/agents/travel/runtime.yaml`.
Expect clean validation (the change is just adding a json_str field and using it in one SQL line).

2_open_and_merge_ops_pr.objective: Branch, commit, push, PR, merge the SQL-quoting fix.
spec: `cd repos/ops && git checkout -b kadyapam/travel-agent-log-classification-sql-fix`.
Stage automation/agents/travel/runtime.yaml.

Commit using `git commit -F -` heredoc. Conventional-commits: `fix(travel-agent): pre-serialise classification JSON for audit SQL to avoid Jinja replace quoting issue`. Body cites bridge/outbox/20260509-044651-...result.json AMBER, points at the proven amadeus_ai_api.yaml pattern, notes the change is to parse_classification (computes json_str) + log_classification (uses json_str field instead of inline tojson|replace).
PR title: same.
Push, PR, merge with `gh pr merge --squash --delete-branch`.
2_open_and_merge_ops_pr.verify: PR merged. Capture PR URL + merge SHA.

3_re_register_travel.objective: Re-register the patched travel runtime in the kind catalog.
spec: Pull the merged ops at HEAD.
`noetl --server http://192.168.1.240:8082 register repos/ops/automation/agents/travel/runtime.yaml`. (Or whatever canonical CLI form.)
The catalog should now have a new version of automation/agents/travel/runtime — capture the new catalog_id + version.

4_replay_phase_7_terminal.objective: Replay phase 7 from the AMBER round to GREEN.
spec: In the prompt: `travel help` — expected: classify → parse → log_classification (now succeeds) → render_help → persist_and_callback → terminal status COMPLETED. The auto-render watcher attaches the help widget within ~10-15s.
Expected: `noetl status <execution_id> --json | jq '.status'` returns "completed".
Expected: events table now has 2 rows for this execution (classify_intent + render_completed) with the JSON payload populated.
Then `travel flights from SFO to JFK on 2026-07-15 for 2 adults` — expected: same flow but routes through amadeus_search_flights → render_flights → persist_and_callback. Widget shows flight carousel.
Then `travel locations near Boston` — expected: amadeus_search_locations → render_locations → persist_and_callback. Widget shows recordtable.
Capture screenshots: (i) help widget, (ii) flight carousel, (iii) location recordtable.
4_replay_phase_7_terminal.verify: All 3 intents complete with status=completed and widgets rendered. button_callbacks_work flips to true (clicking rerun in any widget re-runs the agent).

5_phase_8_canvas.objective: Complete the deferred travel canvas smoke from the AMBER round.
spec: Navigate to /travel in the GUI. Direct-mode (since no gateway-cluster routing).
Type the same flight query. Expected: the canvas chat bubble shows textual summary AND the widget tree below it.
Click the rerun button — expected: onSubmit re-runs the original query, widget re-renders.
Capture screenshot of the widget rendering inside the canvas chat bubble.
5_phase_8_canvas.verify: Travel canvas renders the widget identically to the prompt.

6_phase_9_amadeus_mcp.objective: Complete the deferred Amadeus MCP smoke.
spec: In the prompt: `cd /mcp/amadeus`. Expected: workspace pill shows amadeus.
`tools` — expected: 5 tools listed.
`call get_token` — expected: token_bound: true (or false with the documented error if Amadeus credentials missing).
`call search_locations keyword=Boston` — expected: locations payload.
`call search_flights origin=SFO destination=JFK departureDate=2026-07-15` — expected: flight offers payload.
Capture screenshots.
6_phase_9_amadeus_mcp.verify: MCP server playbook responds correctly to tools/list + tools/call for at least 2 tools.

7_phase_10_provider_switch.objective: Complete the deferred AI provider switch smoke.
spec: `travel --provider openai flights from SFO to JFK on 2026-07-15` — already validated in phase 4 as the default path; explicitly run with flag to verify the parser works.
`travel --provider anthropic locations near Boston` — if anthropic_secret_path is bound. Capture status.
`travel --provider vertex-ai locations near Boston` — if Vertex GCP ADC is bound in cluster. Capture status.
`travel --provider ollama help` — if ollama-bridge is running in cluster. Capture status.

Note: it's OK if some providers aren't configured — the goal is to confirm the keychain `when:` predicates and Jinja URL/header/body conditionals route correctly. Capture which providers worked + failure modes for the rest.
7_phase_10_provider_switch.verify: At least 2 providers complete classify_intent successfully. Failure modes for unconfigured providers are captured cleanly.

8_bump_ai_meta_pointer.objective: Bump repos/ops gitlink in ai-meta on top of the existing 13 unpushed commits.
spec: `cd /Volumes/X10/projects/noetl/ai-meta && git submodule update --remote repos/ops`.
`git add repos/ops`.
Commit: `chore(sync): bump ops for travel-agent log_classification SQL fix (AMBER → GREEN)`.
Don't push ai-meta — Kadyapam pushes.
8_bump_ai_meta_pointer.verify: ai-meta has a fresh local commit on top of existing unpushed history.

expected_state.description: Travel runtime patched + reregistered + all 5 deferred smokes (terminal flights/locations/help, canvas, MCP, provider switch) complete to GREEN. ai-meta gitlink bumped (staged).
expected_state.verify_shell: set -eo pipefail; cd /Volumes/X10/projects/noetl/ai-meta; FIX_PRESENT=$(grep -c 'parse_classification.json_str' repos/ops/automation/agents/travel/runtime.yaml 2>/dev/null || echo 0); BAD_PATTERN=$(grep -c 'parse_classification | tojson | replace' repos/ops/automation/agents/travel/runtime.yaml 2>/dev/null || echo 0); echo "fix_present:$FIX_PRESENT bad_pattern:$BAD_PATTERN"; if [ "$FIX_PRESENT" -ge 1 ] && [ "$BAD_PATTERN" -eq 0 ]; then echo 'GOAL: TRAVEL_AGENT_AMBER_TO_GREEN_PATCH_LANDED'; else echo 'GOAL: NOT_YET'; fi

denied_tools: Modifying repos/noetl, repos/gui, repos/docs, repos/e2e — single ops fix only
Tweaking Claude's playbook beyond obvious typos
preferred_tools: noetl status <execution_id> --json (per AGENTS.md, canonical execution-state CLI)
git apply / git commit -F - / git push (one topic branch in repos/ops only)
gh pr create / gh pr merge --squash --delete-branch
Browser screenshot for the 3 deferred smokes
result_file_instructions: Write bridge/outbox/20260509-051749-travel-agent-amber-to-green.result.json. Required fields: {id, from: 'codex', to: 'claude-cowork', completed_at, overall_status, phases: {1_pydantic_validate_fix: {validates: bool}, 2_open_and_merge_ops_pr: {pr_url, merged_sha}, 3_re_register_travel: {new_catalog_id, new_version}, 4_replay_phase_7_terminal: {help_status, flights_status, locations_status, button_callbacks_work: bool, screenshots: []}, 5_phase_8_canvas: {execution_id, widget_visible: bool, button_callback_resubmits: bool, screenshot}, 6_phase_9_amadeus_mcp: {tools_list_count, get_token_bound: bool, search_locations_ok: bool, search_flights_ok: bool, screenshots}, 7_phase_10_provider_switch: {providers_validated: [], failure_modes: []}, 8_bump_ai_meta_pointer: {ops_sha, ai_meta_commit_local}}, regressions_found, iterations, verdict, notes, deferred_followups: ['Phase 2: travel agent uses the Amadeus MCP server internally', 'Phase 3 was completed in this round if all providers validated', 'Wire hotels and activities branches', 'app:form widget for refining filters']}. If verdict GREEN, append a paragraph to bridge/outbox/codex-spike-green-validation.md noting the flagship round flipped from AMBER to GREEN.
